problem id: 5dd3345c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01001110 -> 01010101
  01100111 -> 00001000
  01000011 -> 00111011
  11101000 -> 00110011
  00110101 -> 10110011
  10000010 -> 01010101
  11010100 -> 11001100
  11000110 -> 01010101
  11111010 -> 10101010
  11000001 -> 01101110

query: 11110000
predicted answer: 11111111
